profile.description: Bias the next Herbalisti curated-selector pass toward book-scale practical remedies, direct hygiene references, materia-medica manuals, repertories, vade-mecums, family physicians, and botanical-principles books while cooling thin almanac, receipt-book, guide-to-health, sensational, occult, veterinary, lecture, and administrative shapes.

sampleSelected.title: The American new dispensatory : Containing general principles of pharmaceutic chemistry; chemical analysis of the articles of materia medica; pharmaceutic operations; materia medica, including several new and valuable articles, the production of the United States; preparations and compositions.  With an appendix, containing an account of mineral waters; medical prescriptions; the nature and medical uses of the gases; medical electricity; galvanism; an abridgment of Dr. Currie's reports on the use of water; the cultivation of the poppy plant, and the method of preparing opium ...  The whole compiled from the most approved authors, both European and American.
